entry.title: New IDC HHSM500201300011I awarded to BUCCANEER COMPUTER SYSTEMS & SERVICE, INC. for the amount of $5,000

ns1:agencyID.name: CENTERS FOR MEDICARE AND MEDICAID SERVICES

ns1:contractingOfficeAgencyID.name: CENTERS FOR MEDICARE AND MEDICAID SERVICES
ns1:contractingOfficeAgencyID.departmentName: HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES, DEPARTMENT OF

ns1:fundingRequestingAgencyID.name: CENTERS FOR MEDICARE AND MEDICAID SERVICES
ns1:fundingRequestingAgencyID.departmentName: HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES, DEPARTMENT OF

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DATA PROCESSING, HOSTING, AND RELATED SERVICES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
